title: FAQ migration advice suggests symlinks that not all agent tools follow
body: The FAQ entry "How do I migrate existing docs to AGENTS.md?" suggests `mv AGENT.md AGENTS.md && ln -s AGENTS.md AGENT.md`, but at least one popular agent CLI we tested reads AGENT.md by opening it directly rather than resolving symlinks in its sandboxed file reader, so it ends up loading stale/empty content. Could the FAQ mention this caveat or suggest keeping both files in sync instead?

title: Compatibility grid has no fallback when only one theme's logo is provided
body: AgentEntry in CompatibilitySection.tsx supports imageSrc, imageSrcLight and imageSrcDark, but if a newly added agent entry only sets one of imageSrcLight/imageSrcDark without the other, the logo appears broken in whichever theme is missing rather than falling back to the other variant.

title: Add search/filter to the examples list
body: ExampleListSection/ExamplesSection has grown to a long list of real-world AGENTS.md files. Finding one for a specific stack (say, a Python monorepo) means scrolling through everything. A small client-side search box filtering by name/tag would make this section much more useful.

title: Hero copy button gives no confirmation feedback
body: Clicking the copy icon in Hero.tsx to copy the example AGENTS.md snippet doesn't change state or show a toast/checkmark, so it's not obvious whether the click actually worked, especially on browsers where clipboard permission silently fails.

title: Missing Open Graph meta tags for social sharing previews
body: Sharing the agents.md homepage link on X/Slack shows a generic title/no image preview. pages/index.tsx doesn't appear to set any og:title/og:description/og:image meta tags via next/head, unlike similar spec sites.
